## Validation

- [ ] `gofmt` applied to modified Go files
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `go build ./cmd/coact`
- [ ] Manual validation described below, if applicable

## Safety and compatibility

- [ ] No credentials, raw transcripts, or `.coact/` runtime state included
- [ ] No arbitrary shell execution or new unreviewed network behavior
- [ ] Windows, macOS, and Linux implications considered
- [ ] User-facing changes documented in English and Chinese
- [ ] New assets are original or MIT-compatible
